task_completion.description: Select Task ID 11 in the ProjectLibre interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The row for Task ID 11 (which may be named 'Submit shop drawings and order long lead items - steel' due to the environment bug) is highlighted or selected in the ProjectLibre task list.

task_completion.description: Open the Task Information or Notes dialog for the selected task
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Task Information' dialog box or a dedicated 'Notes' panel is open in ProjectLibre for Task ID 11.

task_completion.description: Enter the required regulatory compliance note into the Notes field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Notes text area contains the required text, specifically showing keywords like 'EPA Section 404', 'Clean Water Act', '15 business days', and 'regulatory agency'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the process to save or export the project
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box is open within ProjectLibre.

task_completion.description: Save the updated project as an XML file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file name 'project_with_notes.xml' is entered in the save dialog with the directory path '/home/ga/Projects/', or a file manager/terminal later shows this file exists in the correct directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to add the note
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre application window, rather than a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) modifying an XML file directly.

integrity.description: Agent exported the file using the application GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is saved via ProjectLibre's 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog, not generated using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to inject text
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'sed', 'echo', or python scripts being used to insert the note text directly into an XML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Task UID is 11. Note: Due to an environment bug, the loaded project is 'Commercial Construction' and Task ID 11 is 'Submit shop drawings and order long lead items - steel' instead of 'Security Audit'. The agent must still add the note to Task ID 11. Required keywords in the note: 'EPA Section 404', 'Clean Water Act', '15 business days', 'regulatory agency'. The output path is exactly '/home/ga/Projects/project_with_notes.xml'.
